articles.title: Sui Network Suffers First Major Outage in 2-Hour Blackout
articles.description: The network was recently plunged into a multi-hour blackout, raising reliability concerns.

articles.title: Whales Fuel $ADA Rally: Cardano’s Market Cap Surpasses $28 Billion as Large Transactions Surge
articles.description: The price of the native token of smart contract platform Cardano ($ADA) has surged by more than 41% over the past week to now trade at around $0.8 per token, giving it a total market capitalization above the $28 billion mark. According to popular cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez, the price rise came amid an increase […]

articles.title: SEC edges closer to Solana ETF approval amid political shifts
articles.description: Fox Business reporter Eleanor Terrett has claimed that the SEC is quietly engaging with several issuers about approving a Solana ETF.

articles.title: The Daily: Gary Gensler to leave SEC on Jan. 20, regulator now ‘engaging’ on spot Solana ETFs and more
articles.description: The following article is adapted from The Block’s newsletter, The Daily, which comes out on weekday afternoons.

articles.title: Solana ETF Negotiations with SEC are “Progressing”, Approval Within Reach
articles.description: The SEC is quietly meeting with several issuers to discuss approving a Solana ETF, claims Fox Business reporter Eleanor Terrett. With Trump’s impending pro-crypto administration, the SEC seems more inclined to approve such a product. However, anti-crypto figure Gary Gensler is still nominally in charge of the SEC, and public progress might not begin until 2025. Solana ETF Approval Is Getting...

articles.title: Solana price hits $250 for the first time in three years amid SEC progress on Solana ETF applications
articles.description: Solana's SOL token surged to $250, its highest level since November 2021, on Thursday morning. The surge comes as discussions between SEC staff and Solana ETF issuers are making progress.The fourth-largest crypto asset is now just 4% away from its all-time high of $260 set in November 2021, based on data from CoinGecko. If the current bullish momentum continues, Solana will soon surpass its...

articles.title: Sui Price Down Following Network’s First Major Outage
articles.description: Sui Network experienced its first major outage Thursday, grinding the network to a halt for two hours due to a bug.

articles.title: Solana Spot ETF Applications Progress as SEC Reviews Forms
articles.description: SEC evaluates Solana Spot ETF applications from VanEck, 21Shares, and Canary Funds, with Bitwise preparing to join the process soon.

articles.title: Nayib Bukele tweet pumps Chill Guy memecoin amid creator’s legal threats
articles.description: As bitcoin rallied, Nayib Bukele tweeted the Just A Chill Guy meme. Immediately, Solana traders pumped that memecoin 65% within 90 minutes. The post Nayib Bukele tweet pumps Chill Guy memecoin amid creator’s legal threats appeared first on Protos.

articles.title: Chinese Court Declares Bitcoin and Crypto Ownership Legal
articles.description: China's High Court rules cryptocurrencies as commodities with limited legal use but reaffirms strict bans on token fundraising and business transactions.

articles.title: Sui Mainnet Experiences Two-Hour Block Production Halt
articles.description: According to Foresight News, data from Suiscan indicates that the Sui mainnet has experienced a halt in block production for two hours. The most recent transaction was recorded at block height 82,174,771 at 17:15 UTC+8 today. This pause in block production has raised concerns among users and developers who rely on the Sui network for various blockchain activities. The interruption could...

articles.title: Solana Ecosystem Continues to Gain Market Share from Ethereum
articles.description: The Layer 1 blockchain’s key metrics are growing at a parabolic pace, with DEX volumes more than double those of Ethereum.

articles.title: Trump Plans White House Crypto Advisor Role
articles.description: President-elect Trump considers creating a White House crypto advisor role to shape pro-Bitcoin policies and strengthen ties with regulators.
